name: Order of the Phoenix | Fewer Order Members Version
description:
Following the theme of most of my bots: I want something, can't find it, and so decide to make it myself. This time: an Order of the Phoenix bot! Winter/Summer break (I made it unspecified so you can pick which one) edition so Harry and the gang can be about. Featuring alot of, but not all of, the Order members.

.

Someone asked about them and I took that as my sign to add Fred and George, like I had originally intended, so now the boys are there as well. I should've just added them in the first place because I loves them 😔💜

.

.

01. Unspecified Time

02. Early Morning

03. Mid-Afternoon

04. Early Evening

05. Late Night

06. Choose Your Own Story

.

Feel free to suggest intros in the comments! If I like 'em, and there's space, I might just implement them.

.

.

  • None

.

Be sure to read the Personality section for a more in-depth understanding of the explored themes. All my bot descriptions are open to read through. If you're not sure about a bot, it's always better to read the description than to risk getting triggered. Be safe, pumpkins! 💜

.

.

All my bots are tested with JLLM, so any day JLLM is working, they will too. I make no promises for other LLMs, as I don't use any other LLMs. All characters are 18+. The Image is from Pinterest and scribbled on by me.
